## Safety checklist

- [ ] This PR does not include secrets, private data, proprietary documents, or internal planning artifacts.
- [ ] User-visible controls are real, hidden, or disabled with a clear reason.
- [ ] Significant state changes preserve permission checks and auditability.
- [ ] The change is small enough to review safely.
